pi_items.source: Task description explicitly requires this output path.
Task description explicitly requires renaming the track to 'Closed_Boundary_Loop'.
Task description explicitly requires changing the display color to 'Yellow'.

Analysis of the source fells_loop.gpx file reveals it contains 46 route points (which convert to track points). A minimum threshold of 20 validates that the original multi-point geometry was preserved rather than replaced with a trivial 2-point line.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real GPS data from the TopoGrafix 'fells_loop.gpx' example file, which contains a route with 46 points in the Middlesex Fells Reservation. The output path, track name ('Closed_Boundary_Loop'), and color ('Yellow') are explicitly required by the task description. The minimum points threshold of 20 correctly ensures that the multi-point geometry is preserved when the loop is closed.
